/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/rknn_yolov8_demo_3thread_core_bind.dir/main_3thread_core_bind.cc.o CMakeFiles/rknn_yolov8_demo_3thread_core_bind.dir/postprocess.cc.o CMakeFiles/rknn_yolov8_demo_3thread_core_bind.dir/rknpu2/yolov8.cc.o -o rknn_yolov8_demo_3thread_core_bind  -Wl,-rpath,/home/inkbottle/othersrc/npu/demo/yolov8/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64: utils.out/libimageutils.a utils.out/libfileutils.a utils.out/libimagedrawing.a /home/inkbottle/othersrc/npu/demo/yolov8/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64/librknnrt.so -ldl /home/inkbottle/othersrc/npu/demo/yolov8/3rdparty/librga/Linux/aarch64/librga.a /home/inkbottle/othersrc/npu/demo/yolov8/3rdparty/jpeg_turbo/Linux/aarch64/libturbojpeg.a
